records.m_Talk_ENG: I assumed you were here for pleasure when I heard you came here on a light aircraft...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assumed you were here for pleasure when I heard you came here on a light aircraft...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assumed you were here for pleasure when I heard you came here on a light aircraft...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you passed all the main tourist sites to come to these ruins. What an odd taste you have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you passed all the main tourist sites to come to these ruins. What an odd taste you have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you passed all the main tourist sites to come to these ruins. What an odd taste you have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? What do you think about these ruins?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? What do you think about these ruins?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? What do you think about these ruins?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A year before the Administration Failure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A year before the Administration Failure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A year before the Administration Failure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's chief researcher suddenly resigned and left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's chief researcher suddenly resigned and left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's chief researcher suddenly resigned and left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As per principle, she underwent a partial memory wipe and returned to society, and we no longer tracked or recorded her movements.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As per principle, she underwent a partial memory wipe and returned to society, and we no longer tracked or recorded her movements.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As per principle, she underwent a partial memory wipe and returned to society, and we no longer tracked or recorded her movements.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From what I found out later, she was working as an army surgeon, helping patients with Corruption Syndrome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From what I found out later, she was working as an army surgeon, helping patients with Corruption Syndrome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From what I found out later, she was working as an army surgeon, helping patients with Corruption Syndrome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this very hospital, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this very hospital, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this very hospital, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Helping patients... Can it be called helping?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Helping patients... Can it be called helping?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Helping patients... Can it be called helping?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a doctor, that person couldn't save anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a doctor, that person couldn't save anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a doctor, that person couldn't save anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't the doctor's fault that they couldn't be cured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't the doctor's fault that they couldn't be cured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't the doctor's fault that they couldn't be cured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the Corruption Syndrome is not a sickness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the Corruption Syndrome is not a sickness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the Corruption Syndrome is not a sickness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right. She knew it wouldn't work, but she tried anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right. She knew it wouldn't work, but she tried anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right. She knew it wouldn't work, but she tried anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in the end, she was just keeping the suffering patients here against their will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in the end, she was just keeping the suffering patients here against their will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in the end, she was just keeping the suffering patients here against their will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, the one couldn't save anyone abandoned her position as a doctor and focused on researching the Corruption by using all means necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, the one couldn't save anyone abandoned her position as a doctor and focused on researching the Corruption by using all means necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, the one couldn't save anyone abandoned her position as a doctor and focused on researching the Corruption by using all means necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that's when she realized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that's when she realized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that's when she realized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That the Corruption is not bound to a person's body, but is the death reaper that binds itself to their fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That the Corruption is not bound to a person's body, but is the death reaper that binds itself to their fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That the Corruption is not bound to a person's body, but is the death reaper that binds itself to their fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having Corruption Syndrome is... merely a signal that the person's fate has reached its end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Having Corruption Syndrome is... merely a signal that the person's fate has reached its end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Having Corruption Syndrome is... merely a signal that the person's fate has reached its end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why you changed course?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why you changed course?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why you changed course?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calling it the Veritas Research Department and directly interfering with other people's fates?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calling it the Veritas Research Department and directly interfering with other people's fates?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calling it the Veritas Research Department and directly interfering with other people's fates?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the same?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the same?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the same?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've used the souls trapped in an endless loop all for a fragment of a miracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've used the souls trapped in an endless loop all for a fragment of a miracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've used the souls trapped in an endless loop all for a fragment of a miracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because you chose a slightly more humane method, does that make up for all your neglecting and abetting up until now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because you chose a slightly more humane method, does that make up for all your neglecting and abetting up until now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because you chose a slightly more humane method, does that make up for all your neglecting and abetting up until now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of being forgiven for what I did. And I don't think those crude experiments are justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of being forgiven for what I did. And I don't think those crude experiments are justice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of being forgiven for what I did. And I don't think those crude experiments are justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as long as I get results, I do what I think is right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as long as I get results, I do what I think is right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as long as I get results, I do what I think is right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the same?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the same?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the same?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You sound like
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You sound like
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You sound like
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: This world is not the first one you've gone through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This world is not the first one you've gone through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This world is not the first one you've gone through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. But let's save that conversation for a later day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. But let's save that conversation for a later day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. But let's save that conversation for a later day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I'm here is to bring back the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color> who went missing in the Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I'm here is to bring back the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color> who went missing in the Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I'm here is to bring back the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color> who went missing in the Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm also going to investigate whether your escape from my guards was accidental or intentional.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm also going to investigate whether your escape from my guards was accidental or intentional.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm also going to investigate whether your escape from my guards was accidental or intentional.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were caught in a dimensional storm and became stranded here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were caught in a dimensional storm and became stranded here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were caught in a dimensional storm and became stranded here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. I'll believe you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. I'll believe you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. I'll believe you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I know it's a little late, but congratulations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I know it's a little late, but congratulations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I know it's a little late, but congratulations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You finally defeated that Demon Lord in the Qliphoth Game and claimed your victory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You finally defeated that Demon Lord in the Qliphoth Game and claimed your victory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You finally defeated that Demon Lord in the Qliphoth Game and claimed your victory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first victory is merely the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first victory is merely the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first victory is merely the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know about Thagirion. You might have bought some time, but the second game will begin soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know about Thagirion. You might have bought some time, but the second game will begin soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know about Thagirion. You might have bought some time, but the second game will begin soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really think you can stop that doll with your current plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really think you can stop that doll with your current plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really think you can stop that doll with your current plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's hard to be certain, but I plan on finding an answer somehow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's hard to be certain, but I plan on finding an answer somehow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's hard to be certain, but I plan on finding an answer somehow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you'd say that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew you'd say that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew you'd say that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You aren't even bound by fate... but you're always the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You aren't even bound by fate... but you're always the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You aren't even bound by fate... but you're always the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give them our gift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give them our gift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give them our gift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's an access core for Baba Yaga B-D1 aircraft.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's an access core for Baba Yaga B-D1 aircraft.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's an access core for Baba Yaga B-D1 aircraft.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a new type that allows you to safely traverse the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a new type that allows you to safely traverse the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a new type that allows you to safely traverse the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a special occasion for you to visit our nation, so you'll allow me to help a bit with your travels, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a special occasion for you to visit our nation, so you'll allow me to help a bit with your travels, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a special occasion for you to visit our nation, so you'll allow me to help a bit with your travels, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you say you were here to capture us, the people who went missing in the Valve?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you say you were here to capture us, the people who went missing in the Valve?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you say you were here to capture us, the people who went missing in the Valve?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was just an excuse to come meet you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was just an excuse to come meet you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was just an excuse to come meet you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, I'm on probation, so I can't mobilize our forces without permission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, I'm on probation, so I can't mobilize our forces without permission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, I'm on probation, so I can't mobilize our forces without permission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moreover, <color=#ffd34c>the Brothers</color> who follow me are a group united by hatred toward the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moreover, <color=#ffd34c>the Brothers</color> who follow me are a group united by hatred toward the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moreover, <color=#ffd34c>the Brothers</color> who follow me are a group united by hatred toward the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they heard word that their leader is helping the Supreme Administrator, there would be a huge backlash internally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they heard word that their leader is helping the Supreme Administrator, there would be a huge backlash internally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they heard word that their leader is helping the Supreme Administrator, there would be a huge backlash internally.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, you're still willing to help me despite the risk of an internal division...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, you're still willing to help me despite the risk of an internal division...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, you're still willing to help me despite the risk of an internal division...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard Felix was a meticulously calculative person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard Felix was a meticulously calculative person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard Felix was a meticulously calculative person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. Your future actions will be of help to me too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. Your future actions will be of help to me too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. Your future actions will be of help to me too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even if you dislike it, I'm sure you won't be able to refuse my gift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even if you dislike it, I'm sure you won't be able to refuse my gift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even if you dislike it, I'm sure you won't be able to refuse my gift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've retrieved the prototype, General.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've retrieved the prototype, General.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've retrieved the prototype, General.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And 10 minutes ago, Dr. Boron requested a meeting with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And 10 minutes ago, Dr. Boron requested a meeting with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And 10 minutes ago, Dr. Boron requested a meeting with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's time I got back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's time I got back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's time I got back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suggest you quickly move on to your next destination. There's going to be an indiscriminate orbital bombarding here in 5 minutes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suggest you quickly move on to your next destination. There's going to be an indiscriminate orbital bombarding here in 5 minutes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suggest you quickly move on to your next destination. There's going to be an indiscriminate orbital bombarding here in 5 minutes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bombarding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A bombarding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A bombarding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of the storm, the dimension surface has weakened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of the storm, the dimension surface has weakened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of the storm, the dimension surface has weakened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it'll be troublesome if the C.O.s remaining here crawl their way to the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it'll be troublesome if the C.O.s remaining here crawl their way to the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it'll be troublesome if the C.O.s remaining here crawl their way to the Normalside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See you next time, then. I'll be expecting good news from you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See you next time, then. I'll be expecting good news from you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See you next time, then. I'll be expecting good news from you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...She just left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...She just left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She just left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was hoping we wouldn't run into her until just now, but now we're indebted to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was hoping we wouldn't run into her until just now, but now we're indebted to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was hoping we wouldn't run into her until just now, but now we're indebted to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure it's okay to get on that weird helicopter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure it's okay to get on that weird helicopter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure it's okay to get on that weird helicopter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's understandable if the gift is their way of implying that they don't want any unnecessary conflict with the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's understandable if the gift is their way of implying that they don't want any unnecessary conflict with the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's understandable if the gift is their way of implying that they don't want any unnecessary conflict with the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, we must keep in mind that their hospitality might be a trap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, we must keep in mind that their hospitality might be a trap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, we must keep in mind that their hospitality might be a trap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the case, it's better than becoming a hostage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the case, it's better than becoming a hostage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the case, it's better than becoming a hostage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They said that this place will be bombarded in 5 minutes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They said that this place will be bombarded in 5 minutes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They said that this place will be bombarded in 5 minutes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's best that we get out of here quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's best that we get out of here quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's best that we get out of here quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, who's going to operate that huge helicopter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, who's going to operate that huge helicopter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, who's going to operate that huge helicopter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For one, I can't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For one, I can't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For one, I can't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen an aircraft like this one before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen an aircraft like this one before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen an aircraft like this one before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then how are we supposed to get out of here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then how are we supposed to get out of here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then how are we supposed to get out of here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gnrrgh... What? I'm busy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gnrrgh... What? I'm busy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gnrrgh... What? I'm busy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it? Mr. Administrator? What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it? Mr. Administrator? What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it? Mr. Administrator? What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In 4 minutes... What's going to strike?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In 4 minutes... What's going to strike?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In 4 minutes... What's going to strike?

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Northern Union Ground Zero, Depth 1 Corrupted Area.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Northern Union Ground Zero, Depth 1 Corrupted Area.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Northern Union Ground Zero, Depth 1 Corrupted Area.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Indiscriminate orbital bombarding in 2 minutes 45 seconds.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Indiscriminate orbital bombarding in 2 minutes 45 seconds.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Indiscriminate orbital bombarding in 2 minutes 45 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here! I found a manual on the seat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here! I found a manual on the seat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here! I found a manual on the seat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've handed over all the remote control permissions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've handed over all the remote control permissions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've handed over all the remote control permissions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long will it take you to familiarize yourself with the manual?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long will it take you to familiarize yourself with the manual?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long will it take you to familiarize yourself with the manual?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I'm reading it right now! Just hold on a sec!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I'm reading it right now! Just hold on a sec!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I'm reading it right now! Just hold on a sec!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm busting my butt off here and you call out of the blue for what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm busting my butt off here and you call out of the blue for what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm busting my butt off here and you call out of the blue for what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to fly a helicopter I've never seen before in 3 minutes, and a bomb will drop if I'm late?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to fly a helicopter I've never seen before in 3 minutes, and a bomb will drop if I'm late?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to fly a helicopter I've never seen before in 3 minutes, and a bomb will drop if I'm late?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our lives are on the line, so please understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our lives are on the line, so please understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our lives are on the line, so please understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll skip all the maintenance because we're short on time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll skip all the maintenance because we're short on time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll skip all the maintenance because we're short on time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fatima! Enter the coordinates you found inside the hospital into the blinking panel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fatima! Enter the coordinates you found inside the hospital into the blinking panel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fatima! Enter the coordinates you found inside the hospital into the blinking panel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s are gathering! I'll stop them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s are gathering! I'll stop them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s are gathering! I'll stop them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Starting drives 1 and 2...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Starting drives 1 and 2...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Starting drives 1 and 2...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: 5 minutes to complete the energy charging...! Dammit, that's too long!
records.m_Talk_DEU: 5 minutes to complete the energy charging...! Dammit, that's too long!
records.m_Talk_FRA: 5 minutes to complete the energy charging...! Dammit, that's too long!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's impossible to enter the hyperdepths right away. There needs to be another way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's impossible to enter the hyperdepths right away. There needs to be another way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's impossible to enter the hyperdepths right away. There needs to be another way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a dimensional rift nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a dimensional rift nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a dimensional rift nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's unstable because a Shadow made it, but an aircraft specialized in Corruption protection might be able to endure it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's unstable because a Shadow made it, but an aircraft specialized in Corruption protection might be able to endure it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's unstable because a Shadow made it, but an aircraft specialized in Corruption protection might be able to endure it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Shadow's dimensional rift...? That's a little...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Shadow's dimensional rift...? That's a little...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Shadow's dimensional rift...? That's a little...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to interrupt, but only a minute remains before the bombardment starts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to interrupt, but only a minute remains before the bombardment starts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to interrupt, but only a minute remains before the bombardment starts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, to hell with it! I'm just doing what I'm told, so don't blame me if you end up lost in another dimension or turn into a Shadow with 99 windpipes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, to hell with it! I'm just doing what I'm told, so don't blame me if you end up lost in another dimension or turn into a Shadow with 99 windpipes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, to hell with it! I'm just doing what I'm told, so don't blame me if you end up lost in another dimension or turn into a Shadow with 99 windpipes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does the number of windpipes increase when one turns into a Shadow?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does the number of windpipes increase when one turns into a Shadow?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does the number of windpipes increase when one turns into a Shadow?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think she's referring to a C.O. that goes by the name BH99. After seeing a picture of it in a case file, she couldn't eat for 4 days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think she's referring to a C.O. that goes by the name BH99. After seeing a picture of it in a case file, she couldn't eat for 4 days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think she's referring to a C.O. that goes by the name BH99. After seeing a picture of it in a case file, she couldn't eat for 4 days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough talking! Hey kid, if it's cleared enough, get in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough talking! Hey kid, if it's cleared enough, get in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough talking! Hey kid, if it's cleared enough, get in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see the dimensional rift 1 km ahead...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see the dimensional rift 1 km ahead...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see the dimensional rift 1 km ahead...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stabilizing the internal air pressure...! Securing temporary coordinates inside the dimensional strata...! Activating defenses...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stabilizing the internal air pressure...! Securing temporary coordinates inside the dimensional strata...! Activating defenses...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stabilizing the internal air pressure...! Securing temporary coordinates inside the dimensional strata...! Activating defenses...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a missile in the air.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a missile in the air.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a missile in the air.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're entering the dimensional rift at full speed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're entering the dimensional rift at full speed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're entering the dimensional rift at full speed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what's going to happen, so hold tight onto something!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what's going to happen, so hold tight onto something!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what's going to happen, so hold tight onto something!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <No signal>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <No signal>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <No signal>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh...! Comms just had to cut off as soon as they entered the dimensional strata!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaagh...! Comms just had to cut off as soon as they entered the dimensional strata!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh...! Comms just had to cut off as soon as they entered the dimensional strata!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank god I set it to autopilot in case of an emergency...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank god I set it to autopilot in case of an emergency...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank god I set it to autopilot in case of an emergency...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just see what I'll do to you if you die after I helped out this much!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just see what I'll do to you if you die after I helped out this much!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just see what I'll do to you if you die after I helped out this much!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's been hitting the wall for a while... She's not going to have another fracture, is she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's been hitting the wall for a while... She's not going to have another fracture, is she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's been hitting the wall for a while... She's not going to have another fracture, is she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hush. Don't pry into her business and just stand guard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hush. Don't pry into her business and just stand guard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hush. Don't pry into her business and just stand guard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I assumed you were here for pleasure when I heard you came here on a light aircraft...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I assumed you were here for pleasure when I heard you came here on a light aircraft...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I assumed you were here for pleasure when I heard you came here on a light aircraft...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you passed all the main tourist sites to come to these ruins. What an odd taste you have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you passed all the main tourist sites to come to these ruins. What an odd taste you have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you passed all the main tourist sites to come to these ruins. What an odd taste you have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? What do you think about these ruins?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? What do you think about these ruins?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? What do you think about these ruins?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A year before the Administration Failure...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A year before the Administration Failure...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A year before the Administration Failure...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's chief researcher suddenly resigned and left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's chief researcher suddenly resigned and left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's chief researcher suddenly resigned and left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As per principle, she underwent a partial memory wipe and returned to society, and we no longer tracked or recorded her movements.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As per principle, she underwent a partial memory wipe and returned to society, and we no longer tracked or recorded her movements.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As per principle, she underwent a partial memory wipe and returned to society, and we no longer tracked or recorded her movements.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From what I found out later, she was working as an army surgeon, helping patients with Corruption Syndrome.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From what I found out later, she was working as an army surgeon, helping patients with Corruption Syndrome.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From what I found out later, she was working as an army surgeon, helping patients with Corruption Syndrome.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this very hospital, that is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this very hospital, that is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this very hospital, that is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Helping patients... Can it be called helping?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Helping patients... Can it be called helping?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Helping patients... Can it be called helping?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a doctor, that person couldn't save anyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a doctor, that person couldn't save anyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a doctor, that person couldn't save anyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't the doctor's fault that they couldn't be cured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't the doctor's fault that they couldn't be cured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't the doctor's fault that they couldn't be cured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the Corruption Syndrome is not a sickness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the Corruption Syndrome is not a sickness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the Corruption Syndrome is not a sickness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right. She knew it wouldn't work, but she tried anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right. She knew it wouldn't work, but she tried anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right. She knew it wouldn't work, but she tried anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in the end, she was just keeping the suffering patients here against their will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in the end, she was just keeping the suffering patients here against their will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in the end, she was just keeping the suffering patients here against their will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, the one couldn't save anyone abandoned her position as a doctor and focused on researching the Corruption by using all means necessary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, the one couldn't save anyone abandoned her position as a doctor and focused on researching the Corruption by using all means necessary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, the one couldn't save anyone abandoned her position as a doctor and focused on researching the Corruption by using all means necessary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that's when she realized.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that's when she realized.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that's when she realized.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That the Corruption is not bound to a person's body, but is the death reaper that binds itself to their fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That the Corruption is not bound to a person's body, but is the death reaper that binds itself to their fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That the Corruption is not bound to a person's body, but is the death reaper that binds itself to their fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Having Corruption Syndrome is... merely a signal that the person's fate has reached its end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Having Corruption Syndrome is... merely a signal that the person's fate has reached its end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Having Corruption Syndrome is... merely a signal that the person's fate has reached its end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why you changed course?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why you changed course?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why you changed course?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calling it the Veritas Research Department and directly interfering with other people's fates?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calling it the Veritas Research Department and directly interfering with other people's fates?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calling it the Veritas Research Department and directly interfering with other people's fates?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the same?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the same?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the same?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've used the souls trapped in an endless loop all for a fragment of a miracle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've used the souls trapped in an endless loop all for a fragment of a miracle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've used the souls trapped in an endless loop all for a fragment of a miracle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just because you chose a slightly more humane method, does that make up for all your neglecting and abetting up until now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just because you chose a slightly more humane method, does that make up for all your neglecting and abetting up until now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just because you chose a slightly more humane method, does that make up for all your neglecting and abetting up until now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of being forgiven for what I did. And I don't think those crude experiments are justice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of being forgiven for what I did. And I don't think those crude experiments are justice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of being forgiven for what I did. And I don't think those crude experiments are justice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as long as I get results, I do what I think is right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as long as I get results, I do what I think is right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as long as I get results, I do what I think is right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the same?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the same?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the same?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You sound like
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You sound like
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You sound like
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: This world is not the first one you've gone through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This world is not the first one you've gone through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This world is not the first one you've gone through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. But let's save that conversation for a later day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. But let's save that conversation for a later day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. But let's save that conversation for a later day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I'm here is to bring back the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color> who went missing in the Crevice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I'm here is to bring back the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color> who went missing in the Crevice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I'm here is to bring back the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color> who went missing in the Crevice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm also going to investigate whether your escape from my guards was accidental or intentional.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm also going to investigate whether your escape from my guards was accidental or intentional.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm also going to investigate whether your escape from my guards was accidental or intentional.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We were caught in a dimensional storm and became stranded here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We were caught in a dimensional storm and became stranded here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We were caught in a dimensional storm and became stranded here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. I'll believe you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. I'll believe you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. I'll believe you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I know it's a little late, but congratulations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I know it's a little late, but congratulations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I know it's a little late, but congratulations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You finally defeated that Demon Lord in the Qliphoth Game and claimed your victory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You finally defeated that Demon Lord in the Qliphoth Game and claimed your victory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You finally defeated that Demon Lord in the Qliphoth Game and claimed your victory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first victory is merely the beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first victory is merely the beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first victory is merely the beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know about Thagirion. You might have bought some time, but the second game will begin soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know about Thagirion. You might have bought some time, but the second game will begin soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know about Thagirion. You might have bought some time, but the second game will begin soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really think you can stop that doll with your current plan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really think you can stop that doll with your current plan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really think you can stop that doll with your current plan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's hard to be certain, but I plan on finding an answer somehow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's hard to be certain, but I plan on finding an answer somehow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's hard to be certain, but I plan on finding an answer somehow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you'd say that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew you'd say that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew you'd say that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You aren't even bound by fate... but you're always the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You aren't even bound by fate... but you're always the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You aren't even bound by fate... but you're always the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Give them our gift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Give them our gift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Give them our gift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, ma'am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's an access core for Baba Yaga B-D1 aircraft.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's an access core for Baba Yaga B-D1 aircraft.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's an access core for Baba Yaga B-D1 aircraft.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a new type that allows you to safely traverse the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a new type that allows you to safely traverse the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a new type that allows you to safely traverse the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a special occasion for you to visit our nation, so you'll allow me to help a bit with your travels, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a special occasion for you to visit our nation, so you'll allow me to help a bit with your travels, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a special occasion for you to visit our nation, so you'll allow me to help a bit with your travels, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you say you were here to capture us, the people who went missing in the Valve?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you say you were here to capture us, the people who went missing in the Valve?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you say you were here to capture us, the people who went missing in the Valve?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was just an excuse to come meet you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was just an excuse to come meet you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was just an excuse to come meet you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, I'm on probation, so I can't mobilize our forces without permission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, I'm on probation, so I can't mobilize our forces without permission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, I'm on probation, so I can't mobilize our forces without permission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Moreover, <color=#ffd34c>the Brothers</color> who follow me are a group united by hatred toward the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Moreover, <color=#ffd34c>the Brothers</color> who follow me are a group united by hatred toward the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Moreover, <color=#ffd34c>the Brothers</color> who follow me are a group united by hatred toward the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If they heard word that their leader is helping the Supreme Administrator, there would be a huge backlash internally.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If they heard word that their leader is helping the Supreme Administrator, there would be a huge backlash internally.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If they heard word that their leader is helping the Supreme Administrator, there would be a huge backlash internally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, you're still willing to help me despite the risk of an internal division...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, you're still willing to help me despite the risk of an internal division...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, you're still willing to help me despite the risk of an internal division...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard Felix was a meticulously calculative person.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard Felix was a meticulously calculative person.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard Felix was a meticulously calculative person.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. Your future actions will be of help to me too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. Your future actions will be of help to me too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. Your future actions will be of help to me too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even if you dislike it, I'm sure you won't be able to refuse my gift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even if you dislike it, I'm sure you won't be able to refuse my gift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even if you dislike it, I'm sure you won't be able to refuse my gift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've retrieved the prototype, General.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've retrieved the prototype, General.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've retrieved the prototype, General.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And 10 minutes ago, Dr. Boron requested a meeting with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And 10 minutes ago, Dr. Boron requested a meeting with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And 10 minutes ago, Dr. Boron requested a meeting with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's time I got back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's time I got back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's time I got back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I suggest you quickly move on to your next destination. There's going to be an indiscriminate orbital bombarding here in 5 minutes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I suggest you quickly move on to your next destination. There's going to be an indiscriminate orbital bombarding here in 5 minutes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I suggest you quickly move on to your next destination. There's going to be an indiscriminate orbital bombarding here in 5 minutes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A bombarding?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A bombarding?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A bombarding?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because of the storm, the dimension surface has weakened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because of the storm, the dimension surface has weakened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because of the storm, the dimension surface has weakened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it'll be troublesome if the C.O.s remaining here crawl their way to the Normalside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it'll be troublesome if the C.O.s remaining here crawl their way to the Normalside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it'll be troublesome if the C.O.s remaining here crawl their way to the Normalside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See you next time, then. I'll be expecting good news from you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: See you next time, then. I'll be expecting good news from you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: See you next time, then. I'll be expecting good news from you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...She just left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...She just left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...She just left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was hoping we wouldn't run into her until just now, but now we're indebted to her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was hoping we wouldn't run into her until just now, but now we're indebted to her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was hoping we wouldn't run into her until just now, but now we're indebted to her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure it's okay to get on that weird helicopter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure it's okay to get on that weird helicopter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure it's okay to get on that weird helicopter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's understandable if the gift is their way of implying that they don't want any unnecessary conflict with the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's understandable if the gift is their way of implying that they don't want any unnecessary conflict with the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's understandable if the gift is their way of implying that they don't want any unnecessary conflict with the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, we must keep in mind that their hospitality might be a trap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, we must keep in mind that their hospitality might be a trap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, we must keep in mind that their hospitality might be a trap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the case, it's better than becoming a hostage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the case, it's better than becoming a hostage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the case, it's better than becoming a hostage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They said that this place will be bombarded in 5 minutes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They said that this place will be bombarded in 5 minutes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They said that this place will be bombarded in 5 minutes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's best that we get out of here quickly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's best that we get out of here quickly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's best that we get out of here quickly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, who's going to operate that huge helicopter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, who's going to operate that huge helicopter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, who's going to operate that huge helicopter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For one, I can't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For one, I can't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For one, I can't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen an aircraft like this one before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen an aircraft like this one before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen an aircraft like this one before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then how are we supposed to get out of here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then how are we supposed to get out of here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then how are we supposed to get out of here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gnrrgh... What? I'm busy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gnrrgh... What? I'm busy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gnrrgh... What? I'm busy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it? Mr. Administrator? What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it? Mr. Administrator? What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it? Mr. Administrator? What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In 4 minutes... What's going to strike?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In 4 minutes... What's going to strike?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In 4 minutes... What's going to strike?

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Northern Union Ground Zero, Depth 1 Corrupted Area.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Northern Union Ground Zero, Depth 1 Corrupted Area.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Northern Union Ground Zero, Depth 1 Corrupted Area.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Indiscriminate orbital bombarding in 2 minutes 45 seconds.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Indiscriminate orbital bombarding in 2 minutes 45 seconds.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Indiscriminate orbital bombarding in 2 minutes 45 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here! I found a manual on the seat!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here! I found a manual on the seat!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here! I found a manual on the seat!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've handed over all the remote control permissions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've handed over all the remote control permissions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've handed over all the remote control permissions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long will it take you to familiarize yourself with the manual?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long will it take you to familiarize yourself with the manual?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long will it take you to familiarize yourself with the manual?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I'm reading it right now! Just hold on a sec!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I'm reading it right now! Just hold on a sec!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I'm reading it right now! Just hold on a sec!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm busting my butt off here and you call out of the blue for what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm busting my butt off here and you call out of the blue for what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm busting my butt off here and you call out of the blue for what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to fly a helicopter I've never seen before in 3 minutes, and a bomb will drop if I'm late?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to fly a helicopter I've never seen before in 3 minutes, and a bomb will drop if I'm late?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to fly a helicopter I've never seen before in 3 minutes, and a bomb will drop if I'm late?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our lives are on the line, so please understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our lives are on the line, so please understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our lives are on the line, so please understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll skip all the maintenance because we're short on time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll skip all the maintenance because we're short on time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll skip all the maintenance because we're short on time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fatima! Enter the coordinates you found inside the hospital into the blinking panel!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fatima! Enter the coordinates you found inside the hospital into the blinking panel!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fatima! Enter the coordinates you found inside the hospital into the blinking panel!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s are gathering! I'll stop them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s are gathering! I'll stop them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s are gathering! I'll stop them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Starting drives 1 and 2...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Starting drives 1 and 2...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Starting drives 1 and 2...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: 5 minutes to complete the energy charging...! Dammit, that's too long!
root.m_Talk_DEU: 5 minutes to complete the energy charging...! Dammit, that's too long!
root.m_Talk_FRA: 5 minutes to complete the energy charging...! Dammit, that's too long!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's impossible to enter the hyperdepths right away. There needs to be another way...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's impossible to enter the hyperdepths right away. There needs to be another way...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's impossible to enter the hyperdepths right away. There needs to be another way...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a dimensional rift nearby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a dimensional rift nearby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a dimensional rift nearby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's unstable because a Shadow made it, but an aircraft specialized in Corruption protection might be able to endure it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's unstable because a Shadow made it, but an aircraft specialized in Corruption protection might be able to endure it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's unstable because a Shadow made it, but an aircraft specialized in Corruption protection might be able to endure it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Shadow's dimensional rift...? That's a little...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Shadow's dimensional rift...? That's a little...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Shadow's dimensional rift...? That's a little...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to interrupt, but only a minute remains before the bombardment starts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to interrupt, but only a minute remains before the bombardment starts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to interrupt, but only a minute remains before the bombardment starts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, to hell with it! I'm just doing what I'm told, so don't blame me if you end up lost in another dimension or turn into a Shadow with 99 windpipes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, to hell with it! I'm just doing what I'm told, so don't blame me if you end up lost in another dimension or turn into a Shadow with 99 windpipes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, to hell with it! I'm just doing what I'm told, so don't blame me if you end up lost in another dimension or turn into a Shadow with 99 windpipes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Does the number of windpipes increase when one turns into a Shadow?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Does the number of windpipes increase when one turns into a Shadow?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Does the number of windpipes increase when one turns into a Shadow?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think she's referring to a C.O. that goes by the name BH99. After seeing a picture of it in a case file, she couldn't eat for 4 days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think she's referring to a C.O. that goes by the name BH99. After seeing a picture of it in a case file, she couldn't eat for 4 days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think she's referring to a C.O. that goes by the name BH99. After seeing a picture of it in a case file, she couldn't eat for 4 days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough talking! Hey kid, if it's cleared enough, get in!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough talking! Hey kid, if it's cleared enough, get in!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough talking! Hey kid, if it's cleared enough, get in!

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see the dimensional rift 1 km ahead...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see the dimensional rift 1 km ahead...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see the dimensional rift 1 km ahead...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stabilizing the internal air pressure...! Securing temporary coordinates inside the dimensional strata...! Activating defenses...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stabilizing the internal air pressure...! Securing temporary coordinates inside the dimensional strata...! Activating defenses...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stabilizing the internal air pressure...! Securing temporary coordinates inside the dimensional strata...! Activating defenses...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a missile in the air.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a missile in the air.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a missile in the air.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're entering the dimensional rift at full speed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're entering the dimensional rift at full speed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're entering the dimensional rift at full speed!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what's going to happen, so hold tight onto something!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what's going to happen, so hold tight onto something!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what's going to happen, so hold tight onto something!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <No signal>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <No signal>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <No signal>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh...! Comms just had to cut off as soon as they entered the dimensional strata!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaagh...! Comms just had to cut off as soon as they entered the dimensional strata!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh...! Comms just had to cut off as soon as they entered the dimensional strata!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank god I set it to autopilot in case of an emergency...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank god I set it to autopilot in case of an emergency...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank god I set it to autopilot in case of an emergency...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just see what I'll do to you if you die after I helped out this much!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just see what I'll do to you if you die after I helped out this much!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just see what I'll do to you if you die after I helped out this much!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's been hitting the wall for a while... She's not going to have another fracture, is she?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's been hitting the wall for a while... She's not going to have another fracture, is she?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's been hitting the wall for a while... She's not going to have another fracture, is she?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hush. Don't pry into her business and just stand guard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hush. Don't pry into her business and just stand guard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hush. Don't pry into her business and just stand guard.
